since_last: 42% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.26%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -0.96% · Gold +0.52% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 42% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.26%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.26%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -10.51%
cards.body: Leaders: TLN +7.78%, ASML +4.41%, AMAT +4.18%, CGNX +3.78%, LRCX +3.71%. Laggards: SNAP -10.51%, SMR -5.92%, OKLO -4.84%, OKLO -4.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.80% at $207.44
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
